name: Website Screenshot API
tagline: Capture website screenshots as PNG or JPEG images instantly
description:
A fast, reliable API for capturing website screenshots. Supports custom viewport sizes, full-page capture, JPEG/PNG formats, and configurable delays for JS-heavy sites. Results are cached for fast repeat requests.

Features:
- Capture any public URL as PNG or JPEG
- Custom viewport width and height
- Full-page screenshot support
- Configurable delay for dynamic content
- JPEG quality control
- 1-hour result caching
- CORS enabled for browser use

endpoints.name: Capture Screenshot
endpoints.description: Capture a screenshot of the given URL

long_description:
## Overview

Fast and reliable Website Screenshot API for capturing any public webpage as PNG or JPEG. Supports custom viewport sizes, full-page capture, configurable delays for JavaScript-heavy sites, and result caching. Powered by Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Features

- ✅ Capture any public URL as PNG or JPEG with quality control
- ✅ Custom viewport width and height for responsive testing
- ✅ Full-page screenshot support for long pages
- ✅ Configurable delay (up to 5000ms) for dynamic content
- ✅ 1-hour result caching and CORS enabled for browser use

## Use Cases

- **Website Monitoring**: Capture periodic screenshots for visual regression testing
- **Thumbnail Generation**: Create preview images for link directories and portfolios
- **SEO Tools**: Visual audits and competitor page snapshots
- **Archiving**: Save webpage snapshots for compliance and record-keeping
- **Social Sharing**: Generate custom Open Graph images from live pages

## Quick Start

```
GET /screenshot?url=https://example.com&width=1280&format=png
```

Returns the screenshot image directly. Add `&full_page=true` for full scrollable page capture.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 100 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5 | 5,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $15 | 25,000 | 50/sec |

Free tier includes all formats and viewport options. No credit card required.
